raw.subject: Your Portland page caught my eye, Tans By Steph
raw.body:
Hi,

I love the photos of your NW Portland studio on Facebook! It's clear you're passionate about helping people achieve that perfect, sun-kissed glow.

But I noticed you don't have your own website yet, which might be leaving potential customers who prefer to book appointments online unable to do so.

I sketched up a rough homepage idea based on the content you share on Facebook - a clean layout with a services menu, a work gallery that shows off your studio, and a prominent booking CTA so people can easily find a time that suits them.

https://sites.damianbasilio.dev/preview/tans-by-steph-portland

This is just a starting point, but I'd love to discuss further and see if a simple website could help you reach more clients in Portland. Let's talk details and see if it's something that makes sense for your business - a flat fee for local businesses like yours.
